visual_description: An older man with gray hair, wearing a gray suit, holds a phone to his ear while seated, his gaze directed slightly upward and to his right. Behind him, several other individuals are visible in a dimly lit, industrial-looking space with metal structures and fluorescent lighting; some are seated, others standing, mostly out of focus. The man’s posture is upright, and his hand remains steady against his ear as he listens.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a steady pace and moderate pitch, and no noticeable background noise or inflection.
